config.title: Ujednolicanie danych #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50200" #include "50122" #include "50203"
dim g_iTypeId : g_iTypeId = clng(0) dim g_idSrcObj: g_idSrcObj = clng(0) dim g_idDestObj : g_idDestObj = clng(0) dim g_oNXArrayType : set g_oNXArrayType = nx_.new_array() dim g_oNXArrayListFld : set g_oNXArrayListFld = nx_.new_array() dim g_oNXArrayFld : set g_oNXArrayFld = nx_.new_array()
function get_user_count() dim iter : iter = 0 dim iCookie dim strUserName,strCompName iCookie = doc_.getusers(iter, strCompName, strUserName) do while iCookie <> 0 iter = iter + 1 iCookie = doc_.getusers(iter, strCompName, strUserName) loop get_user_count = iter end function
function fopen() g_iTypeId = doc_.getmodule(60113).select_object() if g_iTypeId = TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK then MessageBox "Nie wolno zamieniać odwołań do tego rodzaju danych!", "Ujednolicanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation g_iTypeId = 0 end if if g_iTypeId = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then if get_user_count() > 1 then MessageBox "Uwaga! Zamiana produktów dozwolona jest wyłącznie w trybie pracy jednostanowiskowej", "Ujednolicanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation g_iTypeId = 0 end if end if fopen = (g_iTypeId <> 0)
get_all_references_to_type g_iTypeId end function
function fclose if g_iTypeId = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then MessageBox "Uwaga! Konieczne jest teraz opuszczenie programu i ponowne jego uruchomienie", "Ujednolicanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if end function
function select_src_object() g_idSrcObj = fire_choice_list(g_iTypeId,"Wybór obiektu zbędnego","","","","") end function
function select_dest_object() g_idDestObj = fire_choice_list(g_iTypeId,"Wybór obiektu prawidłowego","","","","") end function
function c##CTRLID_SRC_OBJECT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) if g_idSrcObj = 0 then oCtrl.value = "Wybierz zbędny obiekt ->" else oCtrl.value = trans_.getobj(g_iTypeId,g_idSrcObj).text end if end function
function c##CTRLID_DEST_OBJECT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) if g_idDestObj = 0 then oCtrl.value = "Wybierz prawidłowy obiekt ->" else oCtrl.value = trans_.getobj(g_iTypeId,g_idDestObj).text end if end function
function on_cancel() page_.goback end function
function on_change() trans_.var(GVAR_OPERATION_MODE) = clng(OPERATION_MODE_IMPORT)
dim nCounter : nCounter = 0 dim perf: set perf = doc_.performing("Trwa zamiana odwołań i zapis danych...") dim iter dim pDestObj : set pDestObj = trans_.getobj(g_iTypeId,g_idDestObj) for iter = 0 to g_oNXArrayType.count - 1 dim pCursor dim pObject if g_oNXArrayListFld(iter) = "" then set pCursor = trans_.createrawcursor(g_oNXArrayType(iter),g_oNXArrayFld(iter) + "=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj),"idobj desc","") for each pObject in pCursor pObject.recalcenabled = false set pObject.field(g_oNXArrayFld(iter)) = pDestObj nCounter = nCounter + 1 next else ' ' obejscie dla produktow i dokumentow magazynowych - robione to jest z poziomu SQL'a ' dim bSkip bSkip = (g_iTypeId = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT and (g_oNXArrayType(iter) = TYPEID_N5DOKMAG or g_oNXArrayType(iter) = TYPEID_N5REALPROD))
if not bSkip then set pCursor = trans_.createrawcursor(g_oNXArrayType(iter), _ "idobj in (select p_idobj from vlist_" + _ doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(g_oNXArrayType(iter)).tablename + "_" + g_oNXArrayListFld(iter) +_ " where c_" + g_oNXArrayFld(iter) + "=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj) + ")","idobj desc","")
for each pObject in pCursor dim pChildObject for each pChildObject in pObject.field(g_oNXArrayListFld(iter)) if not pChildObject.field(g_oNXArrayFld(iter)) is nothing then if pChildObject.field(g_oNXArrayFld(iter)).idobj = g_idSrcObj then pObject.recalcenabled = false pChildObject.recalcenabled = false set pChildObject.field(g_oNXArrayFld(iter)) = pDestObj nCounter = nCounter + 1 end if end if next next end if
end if next
dim bSuccess : bSuccess = trans_.saveobjects()
if bSuccess then if g_iTypeId = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then dim idOpakSrc, idOpakDest
dim pCursor1 set pCursor1 = trans_.createadors("select 'idobj'=isnull(c_idobj,0) from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania where coll_lp=1 and p_idobj=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj)) idOpakSrc = clng(pCursor1("idobj")) set pCursor1 = trans_.createadors("select 'idobj'=isnull(c_idobj,0) from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania where coll_lp=1 and p_idobj=" + cstr(g_idDestObj)) idOpakDest = clng(pCursor1("idobj"))
trans_.execsql "update n5pozdokmag set pProdukt=" + cstr(g_idDestObj) + " where pProdukt=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj) trans_.execsql "update n5pozrealprod set pProdukt=" + cstr(g_idDestObj) + " where pProdukt=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj) trans_.execsql "update n5gmop set gmo_pProd=" + cstr(g_idDestObj) + " where gmo_pProd=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj) trans_.execsql "update n5gmstan set gms_pProd=" + cstr(g_idDestObj) + " where gms_pProd=" + cstr(g_idSrcObj) trans_.execsql "update n5opakowanie_produktu set pOpakowanieJedn=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpakowanieJedn=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5opakowanie_produktu set pZamiennik=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pZamiennik=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozsprzedaz set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozsprzedaz set pOpakOrg=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpakOrg=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5egzemplarz set egze_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where egze_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5klient_opakowanie set klop_pOpakowanie=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where klop_pOpakowanie=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozdokmag set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozdoketyk set pdet_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pdet_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozzamowienie set pOpakOrg=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpakOrg=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozzamowienie set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozzakup set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozrecepta set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozzlecprod set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5polrab set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozrealprod set pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5gmop set gmo_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where gmo_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5gmstan set gms_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where gms_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozistat set pistt_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pistt_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5klient_obiekt set klob_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where klob_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pltyppracy set tpr_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where tpr_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc) trans_.execsql "update n5pozdokprod set pdp_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakDest) + " where pdp_pOpak=" + cstr(idOpakSrc)
dim iDummy : iDummy = getglobprofileLong(GLOBPROF_DUMMY_UPDATE) setglobprofile GLOBPROF_DUMMY_UPDATE,iDummy+1 end if end if
if not bSuccess then set perf = nothing MessageBox "Zamiana odwołań nieudana. Obejrzyj komunikaty", "Ujednolicanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation else set perf = nothing MessageBox "Zamiana odwołań wykonana. Dokonano " + cstr(nCounter) + " zamian", "Ujednolicanie danych", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if trans_.var(GVAR_OPERATION_MODE) = clng(OPERATION_MODE_NORMAL) g_idDestObj = 0 g_idSrcObj = 0 end function
function add_reference(byval idType,byval strListField,byval strField) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 0,0,cstr(idType) + ":" + strListField + ":" + strField #endif g_oNXArrayType.add idType g_oNXArrayListFld.add strListField g_oNXArrayFld.add strField end function
function get_all_references_to_type(byval idType) dim pObjDef for each pObjDef in doc_.stdobjdef
'dzieci nie sa rozpatrywane samodzielnie 'dzieci analizujemy przez obiekt ojca if not pObjDef.child then get_references_to_type idType,pObjDef,pObjDef.typeid,"" end if next end function
function get_references_to_type(byval idType,byref pObjDef,byval idReferencingParent,byval strListField) dim pFieldDef for each pFieldDef in pObjDef '------zwykle zwrotne if pFieldDef.type = RELT_REF then if pFieldDef.reftypeid = idType then add_reference idReferencingParent,strListField,pFieldDef.Name end if end if
'------dzikie zwrotne if pFieldDef.type = RELT_WILDREF then dim doc_li: doc_li = 0
while (pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(doc_li) <> 0) if pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(doc_li) = idType then add_reference idReferencingParent,strListField,pFieldDef.Name end if doc_li = doc_li + 1 wend end if
'------zwrotne przez liste if pFieldDef.type = RELT_LIST then if pFieldDef.reftypeid = idType then add_reference idReferencingParent,strListField,pFieldDef.Name end if dim pChildObjDef : set pChildObjDef= doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pFieldDef.reftypeid) get_references_to_type idType,pChildObjDef,idReferencingParent,pFieldDef.Name end if next end function

table.tbody:
Wybierz obiekt, który jest zbędny i wskaż obiekt, który ma go zastąpic
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXC_LABEL(Obiekt zbędny,1)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM_DELONLY(CTRLID_SRC_OBJECT,40) QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,varFunction=select_src_object,Wybierz zbędny obiekt)
QXC_LABEL(Obiekt prawidłowy,1)
QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM_DELONLY(CTRLID_DEST_OBJECT,40) QXE_PICTURE_ACTION(-1,PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT,varFunction=select_dest_object,Wybierz prawidłowy obiekt)
QXR_SEPARATOR(2)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,0,Zamien,varFunction="on_change",1) QXE_BUTTON(-1,0,Zamknij,varFunction="on_cancel",1)
